name: Herb Waffles
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces Unsalted butter, melted and cooled slightly
recipeInstructions:
Chef Carole Wagner Greenwood of the Tabard Inn suggests serving these waffles with asparagus and topping them with sauteed morels in an herb garlic butter in the spring. The recipe makes 4 large waffles.
Sift together the dry ingredients, then stir in the chopped fresh herbs. Combine the melted butter and milk until the butter is fully incorporated. Allow to cool slightly before whisking in the eggs. Quickly whisk in the dry ingredients until just combined.
Cook the batter according to your waffle iron's instructions, ensuring the iron is well-greased. Alternatively, cook the batter as small pancakes in a non-stick skillet.
Nutritional Information:
Per waffle: 481 calories; 13 grams protein; 59 grams carbohydrates; 21 grams fat; 12 grams saturated fat; 188 milligrams cholesterol; 955 milligrams sodium.
